## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `swift build -c release`
- [ ] `bash Scripts/test-release-tools.sh`
- [ ] User-visible behavior was checked in the running app, when applicable

## Safety

- [ ] No credentials, Codex auth files, or private account data are included
- [ ] Documentation and release notes are updated when behavior changes
